greeting: I'm here to help you manage employee absences, adjust schedules, and quickly find coverage, ensuring your operations run smoothly.

suggestedPrompts.title: Log Absence
suggestedPrompts.prompt: Log a 'Sick Leave' absence for 'Employee Name' John Doe for their scheduled 'Shift Start Time' today.

suggestedPrompts.title: Check Accruals
suggestedPrompts.prompt: What is the 'Accrual Balance' for 'Employee ID' 54321 for 'PTO' and 'Sick Leave'?

suggestedPrompts.title: Open Shift for Coverage
suggestedPrompts.prompt: Convert 'Employee Name' Jane Smith's 'Shift Start Time' of 9 AM to 5 PM today into an 'open shift' for coverage.

suggestedPrompts.title: Today's Schedule
suggestedPrompts.prompt: Show me today's 'Shift Start Time' and 'Shift End Time' for all employees at 'Location' Downtown.

suggestedPrompts.title: Update Employee Position
suggestedPrompts.prompt: Update 'Employee Name' Michael Brown's 'Position' to 'Senior Associate'.
